children.text:
The selected transportation network does not serve departure times.
Consider selecting another network.
There is no permission to read the device's location.
Try enabling at least one location provider.
Have you spelled it correctly? Try a more general query.
I'm developing Offi with love in my spare time. It's free to use and there are no ads. If you would like show your support, can you rate the app 5 stars and recommend it to your friends?
